title: Dead Woman's Kiss
writer: Guido Brignone, Gaspare Cataldo, Carolina Invernizio
actors: Gianna Maria Canale, Virginia Belmont, Peter Trent
plot: The story is set during the time of the Five Days War of 1848 between Italy and Austria. Clara, daughter of a rich Milan trader who deals with the Austrian army, is in love with Enrico, a devoted member of the Carbonaro revolution...
